'''gapushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyocyanase|pyocyanase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyocyanase|pyocyanase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gapushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpishith|gæpishith]] || [[word:gæpishij|gæpishij]] || [[word:gæpishish|gæpishish]] || [[word:gæpishi|gæpishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapupushuth|gapupushuth]] || [[word:gapupushuj|gapupushuj]] || [[word:gapupushush|gapupushush]] || [[word:gapupushu|gapupushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapushuth|gapushuth]] || [[word:gapushuj|gapushuj]] || [[word:gapushush|gapushush]] || [[word:gapushu|gapushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapufshuth|gapufshuth]] || [[word:gapufshuj|gapufshuj]] || [[word:gapufshush|gapufshush]] || [[word:gapufshuf|gapufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapushuthu|gapushuthu]] || [[word:gapushuju|gapushuju]] || [[word:gapushushu|gapushushu]] || [[word:gapushuku|gapushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapushuth|gapushuth]] || [[word:gapushuj|gapushuj]] || [[word:gapushush|gapushush]] || [[word:gapushu|gapushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapushuthul|gapushuthul]] || [[word:gapushujul|gapushujul]] || [[word:gapushushul|gapushushul]] || [[word:gapushukul|gapushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapushuthuthu|gapushuthuthu]] || [[word:gapushujuju|gapushujuju]] || [[word:gapushushushu|gapushushushu]] || [[word:gapushuku|gapushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapushuthun|gapushuthun]] || [[word:gapushujun|gapushujun]] || [[word:gapushushun|gapushushun]] || [[word:gapushukun|gapushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapushuthuoro|gapushuthuoro]] || [[word:gapushujuoro|gapushujuoro]] || [[word:gapushushuoro|gapushushuoro]] || [[word:gapushukuoro|gapushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
